title: December 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 5''' is the 339th (340th in leap years) day of the year. There are 26 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 93|''Star Wars Weekly'' 93]] published.
*[[1981]] – [[Lydia Leonard]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Edvin Biuković]] dies.
*[[2001]] – [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]] published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Cloak of Darkness]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'' Part 1 posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2017]] – The Last Jedi Season for [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] released.
*[[2018]] – [[Age of Republic - Qui-Gon Jinn 1|''Age of Republic - Qui-Gon Jinn'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 58|''Star Wars'' (2015) 58]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down'' 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance]]'' opens at Walt Disney World.
*2019 – The ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' Celebration Edition released.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Galactic Republic Fleet Starter]]'', ''[[Separatist Alliance Fleet Starter]]'', ''[[Republic Fighter Squadrons Expansion Pack]]'', and ''[[Separatist Fighter Squadrons Expansion Pack]]'' are released for ''[[Star Wars: Armada]]''.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Battle Scars]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of Rebellion: The Visual Guide]]'' published in the US.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 7]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 2 (Phase II)]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Character Encyclopedia]]'' published in the US.
<noinclude>
